bookmarks.title: Unabyss - Your complete context in every AI you use
bookmarks.excerpt: You run ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor and more - but each starts blank. Unabyss connects your Slack, Gmail, Notion and the rest so every AI pulls what's actually...

bookmarks.title: tldraw offline
bookmarks.excerpt: A local, file-based desktop whiteboard that your AI can use too.

bookmarks.title: sim-use - 给 agent 装上眼睛和手，让 mobile 开发跟上 AI 时代 | OneV's Den
bookmarks.excerpt: 最近在公司捣鼓了一个工具，叫 sim-use：一个跨平台 CLI，让 agent 能在 iOS 和 Android 上高效且准确地”看见画面、点按元素、验证结果”。前段时间它正式开源了，日文版的介绍文章也发在了公司的 Tech Blog 上。不过说来有趣，那篇文章的初稿其实是用中文写的，后来才翻译成日文发表；现在再把它从日文”翻译”回中文、发在自己的博客上，多少有点出口转内销的行为艺术。趁着记忆还新鲜，用母语把里面的技术细节好好聊一遍。

bookmarks.title: threejsassets.com
bookmarks.excerpt: Web-optimized 3D assets for three.js — drop-in ready and licensed for project use without asset-file resale rights.

bookmarks.title: Riven Cloud
bookmarks.excerpt: Riven Cloud runs premium KVM VPS in Tokyo and Singapore with top-tier three-network China-return route optimization — CTGNet (formerly China Telecom CN2 GIA), China Unicom Premium (CUP, AS9929 / AS10099), and China Mobile International N2 (CMIN2).

bookmarks.title: VibeLoft | 全球 VibeCoding爱好者聚集地
bookmarks.excerpt: VibeLoft 是面向全球创作者的 VibeCoding 社区：发现 AI 编程工具，展示真实产品，交流构建经验，在机舱排行榜记录创作成长。
